modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Application error when starting camera software on Windows 10.

full_description_text: The user was trying to start the camera software on their Windows 10 system. They encountered an application error with a specific code. It seems like the software just won't work at all.
short_description: Application error when starting camera software on Windows 10.
description: The user was trying to start the camera software on their Windows 10 system. They encountered an application error with a specific code. It seems like the software just won't work at all.
